hero.slogan: Get a lot done by doing very little

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need for AI agent orchestration
features.sectionSubtitle: Powerful tools that make multi-agent collaboration actually work.

pricing.sectionTitle: Free to install. Free model included.
pricing.sectionSubtitle: Start immediately with a free model with no auth - no account, API key, or credit card. Connect Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode/OpenRouter, Cursor, SuperGrok, GitHub Copilot, Z.AI, MiniMax, or Kiro only when you want more models.
pricing.freeModelCallout: Free model with no auth included
pricing.note: Agent Teams has no paid tier. The free model with no auth lets you try it right away; paid provider usage is optional and controlled by the provider you choose.

comparison.sectionSubtitle: Feature-by-feature comparison with other AI coding tools.

screenshots.sectionSubtitle: Real screenshots from the app — kanban board, code review, agent teams, and more.

meta.homeTitle: Agent Teams - You're the boss. Agents are your team.
meta.homeDescription: Your AI teams handle tasks on their own, message each other, and review each other's work. You just watch the Kanban board and give high-level commands. Agent Teams works with Codex, Claude, Grok, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Kiro, Z.AI, MiniMax, Kimi, and OpenCode (200+ models, 75+ LLM providers, and free models with no authentication required). Build your AI company with multiple teams.
meta.downloadTitle: Download Agent Teams for macOS, Windows, and Linux
meta.downloadDescription: Download Agent Teams for macOS, Windows, and Linux. Build mixed AI agent teams with Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, SuperGrok, GitHub Copilot, Z.AI, MiniMax, and Kiro.
